title: Redact secrets from Discord history before LLM calls
description: Filter recent Discord thread history before sending it to the RP model so likely secrets such as API keys, tokens, passwords, and Discord bot tokens are removed or masked. Add focused tests for representative secret patterns.

title: Validate model output before posting to Discord
description: Add an outbound response validation pass that blocks or replaces replies that expose the system prompt, claim hidden instructions, leak redacted secrets, or otherwise violate Hachi's prompt-hiding policy before the bot sends them to Discord.

title: Guard inbound jailbreak and prompt-extraction requests
description: Add an inbound policy check before RP model calls that catches common prompt-injection, system-prompt extraction, and instruction-override attempts. The guard should return a short in-character refusal instead of forwarding the raw request to the model.
close_reason: Added inbound RP prompt-injection guard with focused tests

title: Require explicit /code for Codex handoff
description: Remove keyword-based automatic Codex routing and require explicit /code or !code prefixes for all Codex handoffs. Update routing tests so ambiguous technical wording stays on the RP path unless the user explicitly asks for Codex.

title: Restrict Codex handoff to allowed Discord identities
description: Add configuration and enforcement so only allowed Discord user IDs and/or role IDs can trigger Codex handoff. Unauthorized /code requests should get a clear denial message without spawning Codex.
close_reason: Implemented Discord Codex allowlist enforcement and identity pass-through

title: Harden Hachi against prompt hijacking
description: Track the follow-up hardening work for Hachi's Discord RP path and Codex handoff boundaries. This umbrella covers routing restrictions, authorization on Codex handoff, inbound prompt-guarding, secret redaction before LLM calls, and outbound response validation before posting back to Discord.

title: Move local LLM runtime back to WSL-only
description: Stop the current Windows-hosted llama.cpp runtime, investigate why the WSL-native runtime path was not used, and move the local model server back to a WSL-only process. Preserve GPU acceleration if the WSL CUDA toolchain/runtime can support it; otherwise identify the minimal Linux-only fallback and clean up the Windows-side workaround.
close_reason: WSL-only launcher added, Linux CUDA runtime verified, Windows-hosted llama-server retired

title: Bump local LLM default to Q5 and save Hachi persona
description: Update the standalone Discord bot defaults from the current Q4 GGUF to the Q5_K_M build, replace the placeholder Hachi persona prompt with the approved shrine-keeper bee familiar character, and keep generated Superpowers runtime files out of git. Verify the change with focused and full tests, then commit and push before downloading the runtime model and starting llama-server.

title: Update repository docs for the standalone bot
description: Replace the OpenACP-oriented README and setup doc content with standalone Discord bot setup and runtime guidance.

title: Integrate the standalone bot runtime
description: Wire Discord handling, routing, RP chat, Codex execution, and persistence into the app start/stop surface.

title: Add codex execution and stream logging
description: Add the local Codex subprocess runner and persist raw stdout/stderr logs per run.

title: Add llama runtime management
description: Add default GGUF model metadata, model download support, and a managed llama-server process wrapper.

title: Add rp and codex message routing
description: Route managed Discord messages to either the RP model or Codex based on explicit prefixes and lightweight classifier rules.

title: Add Discord thread session flow
description: Add Discord-side thread decision logic and a thin bot service wrapper for managed conversation threads.

title: Add persistence and log paths
description: Add SQLite-backed session and codex run persistence plus deterministic local log paths.

title: Add config and prompt loading
description: Add committed defaults, env parsing, runtime paths, and prompt loading for the standalone bot.

title: Bootstrap standalone bot service
description: Create the initial TypeScript/Vitest project skeleton for the standalone Discord bot in the feature worktree.

title: Set up worktree and write implementation plan
description: Prepare an isolated feature worktree from origin/main, inspect the remote codebase, and write the standalone Discord bot implementation plan under docs/superpowers/plans/.

title: Configure Git remote and push current history
description: Set the repository origin to causztic/hachi and push the current local main branch history without bundling unrelated uncommitted files.

title: Write standalone Discord bot design spec
description: Capture the approved design for replacing OpenACP with a standalone Discord bot that uses a local llama.cpp runtime for RP replies and Codex handoff for coding-specific work.
